description: Closed canonical policy action kinds for ActionRequest evaluation.

codes.summary: Workspace write operations, including file create/update/delete/rename intents.
Executor command execution requests across ordinary and system-modifying classes.
Artifact metadata or content read operations.
Excerpt or artifact promotion requests requiring typed traceability.
Backend selection or isolation posture change requests.
Gate override requests that bypass or relax a blocked checkpoint.
Stage summary sign-off requests bound to canonical stage summary hashes.
Secrets lease issue/renew access requests requiring typed policy evaluation.
